visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a middle-aged man wearing a white hoodie, a red-and-grey checkered flat cap, and pink-tinted glasses. He is standing outdoors in a pedestrian area with urban buildings and trees in the background. He is looking down at a smartphone in his hands, then looks up at the camera with an expressive face. (2) The scene shifts slightly as the man holds up two retail boxes for foldable smartphones (Samsung Galaxy Z Fold6 and Google Pixel 9 Pro Fold). He gestures towards them while speaking. Various text overlays and a small cartoon dog character appear around him to emphasize his words. The lighting is bright natural daylight. (3) The setting changes to an indoor retail store environment. A staff member with short hair, wearing a white t-shirt, a face mask, and glasses, is standing behind a counter with a keyboard and monitor. The man is seen across from the staff member. They are interacting with several phone boxes on the counter. Large text graphics showing price discounts slide into the frame repeatedly. (4) The final phase features close-up shots of the phone packaging boxes (Motorola razr, Samsung Z Flip6) against different backgrounds, including a dark surface and an outdoor plant setting. Bold white text overlays dominate the screen to provide promotional information and a deadline.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c 有意思 tim 哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko. [Subtitle]: 老闆!. [Variety]: (Dog character). (2) [Subtitle]: 最近連製姐也換摺疊機了！. (3) [Subtitle]: 我每次看到她展開看漫畫覺得好爽！. [Variety]: 漫畫. (4) [Subtitle]: 我有點想換. (5) [Subtitle]: 我跟你講摺疊機最大的優點就是. (6) [Subtitle]: 大摺展開起來變平板，小摺收起來收納方便. (7) [Subtitle]: 我手上剛好有啦，我來賣你！. (8) [Subtitle]: 我也準備好了. (9) [Subtitle]: 6 萬有找的. [Variety]: (奸商 TIM). (10) [Subtitle]: 5 萬 7 有找的，跟 3 萬 2 有找. [Variety]: (奸商 TIM). (11) [Subtitle]: 3 萬 2 這個是小摺. [Variety]: (奸商 TIM). (12) [Subtitle]: 欸這裡. [Variety]: (奸商 TIM). (13) [Subtitle]: 6 萬跟 5 萬 7 如何？. [Variety]: (奸商 TIM). [Slogan]: $60,000, $57,000. (14) [Subtitle]: 各便宜三千. [Variety]: (奸商 TIM). (15) [Subtitle]: 你是不是想跳我啊？我要去問米可！. (16) [Subtitle]: 這款多少錢？. [Slogan]: Z Fold6, $59,888, 優惠價格 $44,890. (17) [Subtitle]: 好這款的話我們現在下殺 14,998, 優惠價格是 44,890. [Slogan]: -$14,998. (18) [Subtitle]: 那如果是這款呢？. [Slogan]: Pixel 9 Pro Fold, $56,988, $42,790. (19) [Subtitle]: 這款的部分的話現在下殺 14,200, 現在是 42,790. [Slogan]: -$14,200. (20) [Subtitle]: 那如果是這個 Moto 的？. [Slogan]: razr 50 Ultra, $31,990, 優惠價格 $22,890. (21) [Subtitle]: Moto 這一台的話目前我們現在是下殺 9,100, 現在價格是 22,890. [Slogan]: -$9,100. (22) [Subtitle]: 那另外我們有不是 Ultra 的部分 razr 50 的話. [Slogan]: razr 50, $21,990, 優惠價格 $13,890. (23) [Subtitle]: 下殺 8,100, 是 13,890. [Slogan]: -$8,100. (24) [Subtitle]: 然后還有這款的 Flip 6. [Slogan]: Z Flip6, $35,888, 優惠價格 $23,190. (25) [Subtitle]: 那我們現在價格下殺 12,698, 價格現在是 23,190. [Slogan]: -$12,698. (26) [Subtitle]: 想坑我啊！！. (27) [Slogan]: 米可超殺優惠！還不趕快來！. (28) [Slogan]: 只到 2025/01/07 喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 staff member (androgynous/female), and at least 2 distant passers-by in the background of the outdoor scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main male is a middle-aged man in a white holiday-themed hoodie with a checkered flat cap and tinted glasses. The second character is a staff member wearing a white t-shirt, a medical mask, and glasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The outdoor scene shows a city sidewalk with blurred buildings, trees, and a fountain. The indoor scene is a clean, well-lit mobile phone retail store with wooden shelves displaying various smartphone accessories and products.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice starts speaking with high energy and a friendly, informal tone. Background music is an upbeat pop track with a clear electronic beat. Ambient urban noise is faint. (2) As the man discusses prices, a 'pop' sound effect occurs alongside visual text changes. The voice quality is clear and professional. (3) The audio environment shifts to an indoor setting with a slight change in room tone. A second, softer voice (staff member) provides specific price figures. Multiple 'ding' and 'whoosh' sound effects are inserted as price comparisons are presented, creating a rapid, informational pace. (4) The first male voice returns for a final energetic call to action. The music reaches its peak volume before a clean hard cut at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional advertisement for a mobile retail brand named 'miko'. It starts with a humorous premise where the creator (Tim) acts as a greedy reseller offering high prices, which is then contrasted by the much lower, 'real' discount prices found at the official store. The purpose is to attract customers by highlighting significant price drops on major foldable smartphones.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly mentions 'miko' as the retail store, shows their logo, and lists specific discounted prices for several smartphone models (Samsung, Google, Motorola).

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-intensity social media marketing video using contrast storytelling and rapid price comparisons to drive sales for a specific retail store.
